summary: Frontend E2E accessibility compliance testing complete. All user flows working. Accessibility labels properly implemented: skip-to-content link, password toggle aria-labels, sidebar role=navigation with aria-label, mobile menu aria-label. All pages load correctly on desktop and mobile viewports.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key: /admin' - non-functional issue, should be fixed in AdminPage.js to prevent potential future bugs

passed_tests: ACCESSIBILITY: Login page - password toggle has aria-label='Show password'/'Hide password'
ACCESSIBILITY: Signup page - password toggle has aria-label='Show password'/'Hide password'
ACCESSIBILITY: Skip-to-content link exists in DOM (index.html) with href='#main-content'
ACCESSIBILITY: Sidebar has role='navigation' and aria-label='Main navigation'
ACCESSIBILITY: Main content has id='main-content', role='main', aria-label='Main content'
ACCESSIBILITY: Mobile hamburger menu button has aria-label='Open navigation menu'
ACCESSIBILITY: Beneficiaries page - edit/delete buttons have aria-labels (Edit/Delete {name})
ACCESSIBILITY: Vault page - document actions have aria-labels (Preview/Download/Edit/Delete document)
ACCESSIBILITY: Messages page - edit/delete buttons have aria-labels (Edit/Delete message)
UI: Login page loads with email, password inputs and verification method toggle
UI: Login flow - clicking Sign In shows OTP modal with hint
UI: Signup page has all form fields (first/middle/last name, suffix, gender, email, passwords)
UI: Signup page has SMS consent checkbox with Terms and Privacy links
UI: Dashboard loads correctly with estate readiness score
UI: Beneficiaries page displays beneficiary cards with contact info
UI: Vault page displays documents with category filters
UI: Messages page displays empty state with create button
UI: Checklist page displays 30 items with completion status
UI: Settings page has weekly digest toggle and notification settings
UI: Privacy Policy page accessible at /privacy
UI: Terms of Service page accessible at /terms
UI: Mobile viewport (390x844) renders correctly with hamburger menu and bottom nav
NAVIGATION: Sidebar nav items clickable (settings, security-settings, customer-support, dts-management, transition-verification)
NAVIGATION: Dashboard stat cards navigate to respective pages (vault, messages, checklist, beneficiaries)
DATA-TESTID: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
action_items: LOW: Fix React key warning in AdminPage.js - 'Encountered two children with the same key: /admin'
critical_code_review_comments: Accessibility compliance looks App Store compliant - skip link, aria-labels, navigation landmarks all present
Password toggle buttons correctly implement aria-label that changes based on visibility state
index.html has sr-only skip link with proper focus styles
Sidebar and main content have proper semantic HTML with role and aria-label
Mobile nav has aria-label on menu button for screen readers
Icon-only buttons in Vault/Messages/Beneficiaries pages have aria-labels

admin_user.note: This user shows admin sidebar, but can access benefactor pages via dashboard stat cards

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend accessibility features tested and working. Skip-to-content link in index.html. Password toggles have aria-labels on login and signup. Sidebar has role=navigation with aria-label. Mobile menu button has aria-label. Vault/Messages/Beneficiaries action buttons have aria-labels. Only outstanding issue is React key warning in admin pages (cosmetic/console only).

accessibility_compliance_summary.password_toggle_aria_labels: PRESENT - both login and signup pages
accessibility_compliance_summary.icon_button_aria_labels: PRESENT - Edit/Delete/Preview/Download buttons on Vault, Messages, Beneficiaries
accessibility_compliance_summary.form_labels: PRESENT - all form inputs have associated labels
